module.name: no-parameter-reassign
module.description: Disallow assignments and updates to function parameters; use a new local variable instead.

scenarios.name: should allow reading a parameter without reassigning it
scenarios.given: a function that reads but never reassigns its parameter
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the function body

scenarios.name: should allow assigning a new local variable derived from a parameter
scenarios.given: const local = param + 1 inside a function body

scenarios.name: should report direct assignment to a parameter
scenarios.given: a function body that executes param = newValue

scenarios.name: should report an update expression on a parameter
scenarios.given: a function body that executes param++
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the update expression

scenarios.name: should report compound assignment to a parameter
scenarios.given: a function body that executes param += 1
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the compound assignment
